body:
## 🔥Emberlight🔥

### A Vanilla+ world reignited with wonder, magic, and creation.
![emberlight title square](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/382a329a54966e48d68074689f31072534a7acdc.jpeg)

### 🧾 Summary

Emberlight reimagines classic Minecraft as a place of warmth and discovery. It’s a Vanilla+ experience infused with subtle magic, intricate machinery, and breathtaking exploration — designed for long-term multiplayer worlds where creativity and adventure intertwine.

### 📌 Description

From Terralith’s sweeping vistas to Cataclysm’s ancient bosses, Emberlight turns survival into a living legend. Forge powerful enchantments through Apothic Enchanting, uncover arcane mysteries with Iron’s Spells ‘n Spellbooks, and shape the world itself using the ingenious mechanics of Create.

When the adventure winds down, gather your friends and enjoy the quiet side of survival — cooking with Farmer’s Delight, exploring natural beauty, and improving your world with refined Vanilla tweaks like Vanilla Backport and Infinity Cave.

Emberlight keeps Minecraft’s original charm intact while adding gentle depth, community-driven features, and an inviting sense of magic to every moment.

### ✨ Features

- Expansive world generation with hidden wonders

- Balanced mix of magic, tech, and survival

- Handpicked Vanilla+ mods for immersive co-op play

- Refined enchantment, farming, and backpack systems

- Performance-focused and server-ready

### 🛠️ Built For: 

Friends who love exploration, creation, and storytelling — together.

### ℹ️ Server Information
Server mods are included at this link: (https://modrinth.com/modpack/ember-light-server-pack). Download the most recent version, open the instance folder, and copy the mods and config folders to your neoforge 1.21.1 server folder.

### 🤝 Credits
Mod authors and libraries belong to their respective creators.
This pack was curated with respect for the Vanilla experience and designed to be community-friendly and server-safe.

![Emberlight ambient image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33fc76984a6dd30dd41817a43b302d06a0b80b3.jpeg)

### Featured Mods Include:
- Apothic Enchanting
- Create
- Bean's Backpacks
- Farmer's Delight
- Infinity Cave
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- Terralith
- Vanilla Backport
- Yung's Collection
